items.hook: Pope Pontian succeeds Urban I as the eighteenth pope. After being exiled to Sardinia, he became the first pope to resign his office.
items.body: Pope Pontian was the bishop of Rome from 21 July 230 to 28 September 235. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The country's current first lady is Valerie Whipps, wife of President Surangel Whipps Jr., who had held the position since 21 January 2021.
items.body: First Lady of Palau is the official title attributed to the wife of the president of Palau. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: The Battle of Brains is a 13-minute 1941 Canadian documentary film, made by the National Film Board of Canada (NFB) as part of the wartime Canada Carries On series.
items.body: The film, directed by Stanley Hawes and produced by Stuart Legg, contrasted modern warfare with the First World War. Worth a quiet trip down the rabbit hole.

items.hook: Chickenhare and the Secret of the Groundhog review – time-travel fun for plucky hybrid critters
items.body:
A half-chicken half-hare, a skunk and a tortoise go in search of a 3,000-year-old groundhog in this wholesome animation with a surprisingly complex plot

items.hook: Yuen Long attack or "721 incident" in Hong Kong. Triad members indiscriminately beat civilians returning from protests while police failed to take action.
items.body: The 2019 Yuen Long attack, also known as the 721 incident, was a mob attack that occurred in Yuen Long, a town in the New Territories of Hong Kong, on the evening of 21 July 2019. The world is stranger than it lets on.

items.hook: U.S. President Barack Obama signs the Dodd–Frank Wall Street Reform and Consumer Protection Act.
items.body: Barack Hussein Obama II is an American former politician who served as the 44th president of the United States from 2009 to 2017. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: US judge pauses Paramount-Warner merger for two weeks after states challenge deal

items.hook: Merger deal between Paramount and Warner Bros paused by judge
items.body: US court temporarily stops Paramount and Warner Bros merging after 12 states launched legal action.

items.hook: Citizen 13660 is a book about internment of Japanese Americans written by Miné Okubo.
items.body: It is a graphic novel completely illustrated by Miné that depicts the life and community within the Japanese internment camps in the United States. Bring it up somewhere. Watch the reaction.

items.hook: Diocletian appoints Maximian as Caesar and co-ruler.
items.body: Diocletian, nicknamed Jovius, was Roman emperor from 284 until his abdication in 305. One of those things you can't un-know.

items.hook: Jay Silverheels, a Mohawk actor, becomes the first Native American to have a star commemorated in the Hollywood Walk of Fame.
